notes.introduction: An exposition of Revelation 2:20-29 on the judgment pronounced against the church at Thyatira, focusing on the false teaching of a self-proclaimed prophetess, the call to repentance, and the promises given to those who hold fast. Part two of a study on Thyatira, following a prior message on the church's commendation in verse 19.

sections.heading: Recap of Part One: Thyatira's Growth
Problems Exposed: Jezebel and False Teaching
Old Testament Background: Numbers 25 and Balaam
Lessons from Ananias and Sapphira: Acts 5
Prescription for the Faithful: Hold Fast
Promises to Overcomers: Christ's Return and Reign
